_schema.description: Per-ability cast/damage timing data for the sim engine. Generated from tools/SmiteAssetProbe/out/anim-timings.json via scripts/build-ability-timings.py. Durations are mined from the ACL TracksHeader in each AnimSequence's compressed bone data. Manual overrides in _manualOverrides merge on top.

fields.animDuration: Full AnimSequence length in seconds (from ACL NumSamples/SampleRate)
fields.castDuration: Seconds until the attacker can take the next action. For most abilities this equals animDuration.
fields.damageApplyOffset: Seconds from cast start until first damage lands
fields.channelDuration: Total channel time for multi-hit channels
fields.hitInterval: Seconds between hits in a channel
fields.finalHitOffset: When the last/heavy hit lands, for phase abilities
fields._altAnims: Alternative animation variants found for this slot

A02._castSource: measured (user timecode 11 frames @ 60fps)
A02._comment: DEPLOYABLE (GA_Loki_A02 has OnDeployableSpawned). cast = 0.183s user-measured; deployable ticks independently for ~4s with 8 hits at 0.5s intervals.

A03._castSource: measured (user timecode 22:47→24:37 = 110 frames @ 60fps)
A03._comment: 5 flurry + 1 final = 6 hits (BP AmountOfWeakSlashes=5). Interval = cast / 6. cast = 1.833s user-measured.

A04._castSource: mined: ANS_ForceFullBody Duration
A04._comment: Two-strike ult: cripple + heavy. Heavy at cast midpoint.
